description: CompositionMaroon striped leggings made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, has an elasticated waistband and brand logo appliqued on the left side under the waistbandFitRegularWash careHand or machine wash cold with a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyTumble dry lowDry in shadeDo not bleachWarm ironPamper your legs and give everyday looks a sophisticated touch with this pair of black leggings from urban yoga. The cotton/lycra blend ensures that they stay snug and protect you from the winter chill. Team it with a short skirt for a sensational look.Model statisticsThe product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26"
